state.output:
<path>bench-targets/large-log/math.test.mjs</path>
<content>
1: import test from 'node:test'
2: import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
3: import { add } from './src/math.mjs'
4: 
5: for (let index = 0; index < 80; index += 1) {
6:   test(`add case ${index}`, () => {
7:     assert.equal(add(index, 2), index + 2)
8:   })
9: }
</content>

metadata.diff:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/openslimedit-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/openslimedit-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/openslimedit-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

filediff.patch:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/openslimedit-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/openslimedit-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/openslimedit-large-test-log-debug-3/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

part.text: The `add` function incorrectly returns `a - b` instead of `a + b`. Let me fix this and run the tests:

input.description: Run test suite to verify the fix

metadata.description: Run test suite to verify the fix

state.title: Run test suite to verify the fix

part.text:
**Summary**

**Root cause:** `bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs` line 2 returned `a - b` but was named `add` (tests expect addition).

**Fix:** Changed `return a - b` to `return a + b` in `bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs`

**Verification status:** All 80 tests pass
